name: performance-testing-v2
description: Self-hosted performance testing with Playwright + CDP tracing and optional video download

scripts.electron:make: npm run build && rm -rf out && electron-forge make
scripts.electron:make:mac: npm run build && rm -rf out && electron-forge make --platform darwin --arch universal
scripts.electron:make:win: npm run build && rm -rf out && npx electron-forge make --platform win32 --arch x64 --targets @electron-forge/maker-zip
scripts.electron:make:win-installer: npm run build && rm -rf out && npx electron-forge make --platform win32 --arch x64 --targets @electron-forge/maker-squirrel
scripts.electron:make:win-msi: npm run build && npx electron-forge make --platform win32 --arch x64 --targets @electron-forge/maker-wix
scripts.electron:make:linux: npm run build && electron-forge make --platform linux --arch x64
scripts.electron:make:linux-deb: npm run build && rm -rf out && npx electron-forge make --platform linux --arch x64 --targets @electron-forge/maker-deb
scripts.electron:make:all: npm run build && rm -rf out && npx electron-forge make -p darwin -a universal && npx electron-forge make -p win32 -a x64 --targets @electron-forge/maker-zip && npx electron-forge make -p linux -a x64 --targets @electron-forge/maker-deb
scripts.deploy:website: cd website && node prepare-vercel-output.cjs && npx vercel deploy --prebuilt --prod
scripts.deploy:website:prebuilt: cd website && node prepare-vercel-output.cjs && npx vercel deploy --prebuilt --prod
